title: [release-1.2] Bump to Skopeo v1.2.4, c/common to v0.38.12
body: Bump containers/common to v0.38.12 and Skopeo to v1.2.4 in preparation for RHEL 8.4.0.2.  Will make a v1.2.4 release from this once merged.

comments.body: Could you add one extra commit to bump to v1.2.4-dev again, please? Compare #1293.
@mtrmac, will spin up a new PR for 1.2.4-dev
